creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186437
garcon patch with mandatory GTK2

While testing with non standard options I noticed that disabling GTK2 causes failures in other ports, due to the fact that we don't have direct control on the options chosen by the user.

Since XFCE is anyway using a mix of GTK2 and GTK3 it's reasonable to force both options to be compiled, that was the default anyway.

I'll be committing this version of the patch for the time being.
